expectations.evidence: Queried zmluvy for ICO 17317282, found contracts with/without UVO links
Found 9 contracts without UVO links totaling 10M EUR. Differentiated quality of UVO links (profile-only vs specific procurement)
Notes risk categories (vysoke/stredne) but doesn't use standardized zlta stopa format. Uses 'cervene upozornenie' instead
Lists Zive namestie 7M, Zilina 1.56M, Kanianka 565K, Krasnany 488K, Nizny Klatov 336K, Raca 55K
